judgment.summary: A high-growth business with strong gross margins and cash reserves, offset by high valuation multiples and thin operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 0.60 beat the 0.51 estimate by 18.3%, with the next earnings date on 2026-08-06.
positives: Revenue growth of 32.2% and earnings growth of 104.0% show strong momentum.
Gross margin of 79.9% reflects high-quality product economics.
Strong liquidity position with $4.76B in total cash and a current ratio of 3.40.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $936.73M provides significant operational flexibility.
negatives: Valuation is high with a trailing P/E of 523.67 and a Price/Sales of 19.80.
Operating margin is thin at only 0.8%.
Return on assets is negative at -0.2%.
